title: polystichum lanuginosum
intro: Polystichum lanuginosum, also known as the woolly fern or hairy shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum lanuginosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
